g.style: animation: moveLeft 9s linear infinite; animation-delay: 1.5s; filter: drop-shadow(2px 5px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5));
animation: moveLeftSlow 14s linear infinite; animation-delay: 5s; filter: drop-shadow(3px 8px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.6));
animation: moveRightSlow 22s linear infinite; filter: drop-shadow(3px 8px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.5));
